headline: Teledyne FLIR Defense Awarded $28.8 Million Contract by U.S. Customs and Border Protection for Mobile Surveillance Systems
summary: ELKRIDGE, Md., June 24, 2026--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) announced that Teledyne FLIR Defense has won a $28.8 million contract from U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), an agency of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, to support the agency’s Enhanced Mobile Surveillance Capability–Lite (eMSC-L) program to bolster border security operations.
